name: documind-core-multiformat
description: Fifty deterministic questions over generated DOCX, PDF, PPTX, Markdown, and TXT fixtures.

paragraphs: DocuMind Golden reimbursement policy.
Reimbursement deadline: employees must submit expense claims within 30 working days after the expense occurs.
Required reimbursement materials are the original invoice, an expense detail sheet, and an approval form.
Missing approval form rule: if the approval form is missing, finance must not enter the payment workflow.
Travel meal allowance is 80 RMB per person per day for approved business trips.
Taxi reimbursement above 200 RMB requires a trip explanation and department manager approval.
Conference fee reimbursement requires the conference notice and attendee list.
Finance review must finish within 5 working days after complete materials are submitted.
Rejected reimbursement claims can be resubmitted within 10 working days after the rejection notice.
The reimbursement owner is the Finance Operations team.
DocuMind Golden procurement contract.
Payment milestone one: 30 percent is paid after contract signing.
Payment milestone two: 60 percent is paid after written acceptance.
Payment milestone three: 10 percent is paid after the warranty period ends with no quality issues.
Acceptance record rule: the written acceptance record is the basis for the second payment.
Penalty rule: a party that fails to perform must pay liquidated damages equal to 10 percent of the contract amount.
Delivery deadline: the supplier must complete delivery within 45 calendar days after signing.
Warranty period: the warranty lasts 12 months after acceptance.
Change order rule: scope changes require written confirmation from both parties.
Contract risk owner: the Procurement Management Office tracks supplier delivery risk.

slides: DocuMind Golden East China Sales Plan
Q3 East China revenue target is 12 million RMB.
The expected year-over-year growth rate is 15 percent.
New customers must contribute at least 30 percent of Q3 revenue.
Strategic accounts are reviewed every month.
Sales owners update the risk list every week.
Pipeline review happens every Monday morning.
Discounts above 15 percent require regional director approval.
Deals over 2 million RMB need legal review before signing.

documents.content:
# DocuMind Golden Security Handbook

## Password Policy
Password rotation happens every 90 days. Password length must be at least 12 characters.

## Multi Factor Authentication
MFA is mandatory for administrator accounts and remote access.

## Data Export
Customer data exports require approval from the data protection officer. Export logs must be retained for 180 days.

## Incident Response
Security incidents must be reported within 2 hours. The incident commander must publish a closure report within 5 working days.

## Device Control
Unencrypted removable storage is prohibited for customer data.

DocuMind Golden onboarding checklist.

New hires must finish account activation on day 1.

Security training must be completed within 7 calendar days after joining.

The mentor assignment must be completed before the end of week 1.

Probation review happens in month 3 and requires manager written feedback.

Equipment return must be completed within 3 working days after offboarding.

The HR Service Desk owns onboarding ticket closure.
